---
title: "GV300 Assignment 4"
description: "My Portfolio"
output: distill::distill_article
---

Hi, I’m Adam, a Politics and International Relations student at the University of Essex.

This site presents a short GV300 portfolio project. The Showcase tab contains an A/B test analysis examining whether issue-focused political messaging increases supporter signups.

**Navigation:**
- [Showcase](showcase.html)
- [About Me](postcard.html)
